top_signals.title: BOE May Bear Temporary Above-Target Inflation to Support UK, Bailey Says
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England could temporarily tolerate inflation staying above its 2% target in order to support the UK’s weak economy, Governor Andrew Bailey said, so long as second-round price effects do not emerge. “Given the context of softness in the real economy and uncertainty around the scale and duration of the shock, tolerating temporarily above-target inflation to provide some support for the real economy is an appropriate way to approach the trade-off,” Bailey said at an economic conference in Reykjavík, Iceland. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Aave Labs secures dual UK licenses for regulated crypto payments infrastructure through local subsidiary
top_signals.summary: Aave Labs has obtained FCA cryptoasset registration in the U.K. for its Push subsidiaries, unlocking zero-fee fiat on-ramps.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
